'''Elerion''' was a notorious [[Gambling/Legends|gambling]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]] near [[Phoebus]].

==History==
During the [[Cold War (Galactic Republic–Sith Empire)|Cold War]] between the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] and the [[Sith Empire (Post–Great Hyperspace War)|Sith Empire]], the [[Casino/Legends|casino]] of Elerion collected evidence that one of its richest [[gambler]]s was cheating. The establishment consequently hired a [[Slicer/Legends|slicer]] to hack the cheater's [[Bank/Legends|bank]] account and transfer the undeserved [[Credit chip/Legends|credits]] discreetly back.<ref name="Mission">{{TORcite|type=crewskill|Slicing|Fortune is fickle}}</ref>

[[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa]] traveled to Elerion on a secret mission to recover stolen [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] intel. The [[Lucky Star (Elerion)|Lucky Star]] [[Casino/Legends|casino]] was located in the planet's [[Capital/Legends|capital]], [[Kushal Vogh]].

The [[Duros/Legends|Duros]] [[M'a Jong]] once owned a casino on this planet.

{{Planet-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
The planet originally appeared in ambiguously [[canon]] ''[[Star Wars Tales|Tales]]'' story "[[Lucky Stars]]." It was later mentioned in the lore of the ''[[Star Wars Galaxies Trading Card Game]]'' card and the corresponding item in the [[Wikipedia:Massively multiplayer online role-playing game|MMORPG]] ''[[Star Wars Galaxies]]'', which established its canonicity within [[Star Wars Legends|''Star Wars'' Legends]].
